rules: No client names unless already public

projects.name: Project Radar
projects.summary: Public-safe dashboard for tracking active, warm, parked, shipped, and dead projects.
projects.current_thread: Initial GitHub repo and single-page dashboard setup.
projects.next_action: Enable GitHub Pages from main/root after files are committed.
projects.blocker: Pages settings still need to be enabled in GitHub.

log.note: Created public repo and started static dashboard setup.

projects.name: ShadeSec
projects.summary: Security company umbrella for consulting, product work, and AI/security experiments.
projects.current_thread: Balancing consulting work, product ideas, and public-safe project tracking.
projects.next_action: Keep public dashboard entries sanitized and separate from client work.
projects.blocker: Many parallel threads competing for attention.

log.note: Included as umbrella tracker for work streams.

projects.name: Control+S
projects.summary: Control and evidence assessment product for structured security maturity work.
projects.current_thread: Pre-launch review, product model cleanup, and security remediation.
projects.next_action: Close launch-blocking auth, scoping, evidence access, and deletion gaps.
projects.blocker: Launch readiness issues remain in auth, scoping, and data handling.

log.note: Reviewed soft-launch readiness and identified blockers.

projects.name: RapidRecap
projects.summary: YouTube recap product with subscription sync, generated summaries, and screenshot context.
projects.current_thread: Cloudflare Worker consolidation, screenshot pipeline, and long-video handling.
projects.next_action: Decide handling path for long-video failures.
projects.blocker: Long videos can fail with current model path.

log.note: Seeded from current known work on summaries, screenshots, and Worker migration.

projects.name: Canary AI Infra
projects.summary: Honey-token system for testing AI providers, routers, agents, and inference supply chains.
projects.current_thread: Naming and scope around canaries, honey tokens, routers, and provider attribution.
projects.next_action: Pick a name and define the smallest useful prototype.
projects.blocker: Needs tight product boundary and safe test design.

log.note: Explored canary/honey-token naming and LLM infrastructure attribution model.

projects.name: Private Compute Sandboxes
projects.summary: Private cloud compute layer focused on customer-controlled execution and privacy claims.
projects.current_thread: Provider tech, attestation, abstraction layer, and customer credential handling.
projects.next_action: Define what can be honestly promised based on the selected compute substrate.
projects.blocker: Attestation and operator-access boundaries need a clean answer.

log.note: Narrowed scope away from private AI inference and toward private cloud compute.

projects.name: slop2prod
projects.summary: Code review queue for turning rough AI-generated code into production-ready software.
projects.current_thread: Static analysis first, GitHub/upload intake, reasoning pass, and issue dedup.
projects.next_action: Decide minimal paid review workflow and landing page promise.
projects.blocker: Needs simple scope that can be delivered manually at first.

log.note: V2 direction set around static analysis, LLM dedup, and queue-based review.

projects.name: Tap & Cert
projects.summary: iOS certification drill app with fast question flow and streak mechanics.
projects.current_thread: CISSP-style study product with compact daily use.
projects.next_action: Build or prototype the core question session loop.
projects.blocker: Needs content source and app skeleton.

log.note: Defined iOS-only certification app direction and tagline options.

projects.name: Check Later
projects.summary: Capture links from phone share sheet and review them later on desktop.
projects.current_thread: iPhone share capture, cached copy, desktop-first review, and arbitrary link support.
projects.next_action: Pick minimal capture path and storage model.
projects.blocker: Needs smallest viable mobile capture flow.

log.note: Defined problem around Safari tabs and desktop-first review.

projects.name: WindowVision
projects.summary: Walkthrough-video pipeline for extracting rooms and windows for coverings.
projects.current_thread: PWA upload flow, model-based room/window extraction, and future LiDAR path.
projects.next_action: Prototype upload plus structured extraction on one walkthrough video.
projects.blocker: Needs sample data and extraction reliability test.

log.note: Sketched PWA and future LiDAR direction.

projects.name: Kalimotxo
projects.summary: Canned wine-and-cola beverage concept with slim can mockups and batch strategy.
projects.current_thread: Manual canning, batch feasibility, ratios, and product strategy.
projects.next_action: Validate legal and small-batch production path before spending on packaging.
projects.blocker: Alcohol production and canning path are the gating questions.

log.note: Moved from mockups into batch and canning strategy questions.

projects.name: Autonomous Coffee Table
projects.summary: Hidden-motion coffee table concept with concealed drive system and stable base.
projects.current_thread: Invisible wheel/track mechanism, omnidirectional movement, and rotating base concept.
projects.next_action: Find a hidden drive mechanism that fits under a furniture base.
projects.blocker: Mechanical package must be hidden and stable.

log.note: Explored hidden drive systems and base rotation approach.

projects.name: extweets
projects.summary: Minimal branding and logo exploration around exported tweets or X-related tooling.
projects.current_thread: Black/white SVG logo variants using X and bird motifs.
projects.next_action: Define actual product surface before more branding work.
projects.blocker: Brand exists before product scope is defined.

projects.name: SupaLive
projects.summary: Keepalive service concept for preventing idle free-tier backends from pausing.
projects.current_thread: HTTP heartbeat, scheduler, dashboard, alerts, and lightweight billing.
projects.next_action: Decide whether this is worth shipping as a tiny paid utility.
projects.blocker: May be too small unless bundled with broader devops utilities.

log.note: Defined keepalive approach and possible product path.

projects.name: MindSnackTV
projects.summary: Automation flow for turning YouTube content into social posts with thumbnails.
projects.current_thread: n8n flow with transcript, model summary, X posting, and media upload.
projects.next_action: Fix media ID attachment path or retire the workflow.
projects.blocker: Media upload works, but attachment handling was unreliable.

projects.name: open-mic-form
projects.summary: Small web/app experiment around form capture and deployment plumbing.
projects.current_thread: Cloudflare Pages versus Worker setup and Expo/Metro bundling issues.
projects.next_action: Decide whether to revive or archive.
projects.blocker: Deploy and bundling debt from older setup.

log.note: Last known issue was Expo/Metro bundling and Cloudflare setup noise.
